components.text:
The world of cultivators is vast beyond imagination.

Mortals see only kingdoms, villages, forests, and mountains.

Cultivators see opportunity.

Across the world exist hidden sects, ancient ruins, forbidden realms, spirit veins, and secret inheritances left behind by long-dead experts.

Resources determine everything.

Without resources, even the greatest genius eventually stagnates.

Spiritual Stones — Crystallized Qi formed naturally within spirit veins beneath the earth. They are used as currency among cultivators and aid cultivation by providing pure Qi directly.

Spirit Herbs — Plants nourished by Heaven and Earth Qi over many years. Some heal wounds; others strengthen cultivation, refine the body, or extend lifespan.

Pills — Created by alchemists through refining spirit herbs and treasures. Pills may accelerate cultivation, heal injuries, cleanse impurities, or assist breakthroughs.

Talismans — Crafted by talisman masters using special ink, Qi, and inscriptions. Some unleash flames, summon barriers, increase speed, or ward against evil spirits.

Arrays and Formations — Complex structures capable of hiding locations, trapping enemies, gathering Qi, or protecting entire sects.

Spirit Beasts — Creatures that absorb Qi naturally. Their bodies contain valuable materials used for pills, weapons, armor, and cultivation.
Natural Treasures — Rare objects born from unique environments — heavenly flames, frost crystals, lightning wood, moon essence, spirit metals, and countless others.

The strong rise through these resources.

The weak die pursuing them.

This is the true face of the cultivation world.

And despite all the dangers awaiting me, I knew from the moment I stepped through that hidden cave wall…

I could never turn back.
